mapper.sql: risk_id, project_id, project_name, assessment_title, market_risk_score, finance_risk_score, tech_risk_score, management_risk_score, policy_risk_score, total_score, risk_level, conclusion, attachments, assessment_status, process_instance_id, assessor_id, assessor_name, assessment_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM risk_assessment WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO risk_assessment ( project_id, project_name, assessment_title, market_risk_score, finance_risk_score, tech_risk_score, management_risk_score, policy_risk_score, total_score, risk_level, conclusion, attachments, assessment_status, process_instance_id, assessor_id, assessor_name, assessment_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{assessmentTitle}, #{marketRiskScore}, #{financeRiskScore}, #{techRiskScore}, #{managementRiskScore}, #{policyRiskScore}, #{totalScore}, #{riskLevel}, #{conclusion}, #{attachments}, #{assessmentStatus}, #{processInstanceId}, #{assessorId}, #{assessorName}, #{assessmentTime}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE risk_assessment
project_id = #{projectId}, assessment_title = #{assessmentTitle}, market_risk_score = #{marketRiskScore}, finance_risk_score = #{financeRiskScore}, tech_risk_score = #{techRiskScore}, management_risk_score = #{managementRiskScore}, policy_risk_score = #{policyRiskScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, conclusion = #{conclusion}, attachments = #{attachments}, assessment_status = #{assessmentStatus}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, assessment_time = #{assessmentTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete:
UPDATE risk_assessment SET del_flag = '2' WHERE risk_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM risk_assessment WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
